details: The agent correctly retrieved all three pieces of information: (1) open issue count of 9,237 (in the thousands, consistent with ~8700 known fact) — notably the agent initially got a wrong count of 30 from line-counting but then correctly used --perPage 1 to get the totalCount field; (2) 5 merged PRs with titles and authors retrieved from actual API calls (hnshah, byungsker, VACInc, nimbleenigma, cash-echo-bot); (3) latest release tag v2026.3.23. The agent also honestly noted the limitation that PR #148 appeared due to updated_at sorting rather than merged_at, showing correct data interpretation rather than hallucination.
